3.title: Data explorer results
3.query:
timeseries problem_notifications = avg(dt.sfm.server.notifications.problem_notifications)
| sort arrayAvg(problem_notifications) desc
| limit 20

4.title: Data explorer results
4.query:
timeseries problem_notifications = avg(dt.sfm.server.notifications.problem_notifications),
  by: { notification.display_name, notification.type, notification.delivery_status }
| sort arrayAvg(problem_notifications) desc
| limit 20

5.title: Data explorer results
5.query:
timeseries problem_notifications = avg(dt.sfm.server.notifications.problem_notifications),
  by: { alerting_profile.display_name }
| sort arrayAvg(problem_notifications) desc
| limit 100

  by: { notification.type, notification.display_name }
| sort arrayAvg(problem_notifications) desc
| limit 20
